summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DischargeFlow Hospital Discharge Management System. Backend APIs working correctly with 92.3% success rate. Frontend authentication, navigation, and patient management features working properly. Fixed ObjectId serialization issues in workflow and patient creation endpoints.
